target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive structural damage including collapsed roof sections, exposed internal framing, and widespread facade destruction; damage appears to cover more than 45% of the visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Large portions of roof and upper floors are missing; facade is heavily damaged with exposed structural elements; debris field at base indicates collapse of significant structural mass; fire and smoke indicate ongoing destruction consistent with 75-100% damage.

summary: Two buildings are assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE (45%+ visible area affected) and another DESTROYED (75-100% damage). The scene depicts a large, multi-story building with extensive fire, smoke, and structural collapse, surrounded by debris, indicating catastrophic destruction. The functional impact is likely complete loss of use for the targeted structures.
